'''yasosho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:qintar|qintar]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-s-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:qintar|qintar]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| yasosho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:yæsesheth|yæsesheth]] || [[word:yæseshej|yæseshej]] || [[word:yæseshesh|yæseshesh]] || [[word:yæseshe|yæseshe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:yasososhoth|yasososhoth]] || [[word:yasososhoj|yasososhoj]] || [[word:yasososhosh|yasososhosh]] || [[word:yasososho|yasososho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:yasoshoth|yasoshoth]] || [[word:yasoshoj|yasoshoj]] || [[word:yasoshosh|yasoshosh]] || [[word:yasosho|yasosho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:yasofshoth|yasofshoth]] || [[word:yasofshoj|yasofshoj]] || [[word:yasofshosh|yasofshosh]] || [[word:yasofshof|yasofshof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:yasoshotho|yasoshotho]] || [[word:yasoshojo|yasoshojo]] || [[word:yasoshosho|yasoshosho]] || [[word:yasoshoko|yasoshoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:yasoshoth|yasoshoth]] || [[word:yasoshoj|yasoshoj]] || [[word:yasoshosh|yasoshosh]] || [[word:yasosho|yasosho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:yasoshothol|yasoshothol]] || [[word:yasoshojol|yasoshojol]] || [[word:yasoshoshol|yasoshoshol]] || [[word:yasoshokol|yasoshokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:yasoshothotho|yasoshothotho]] || [[word:yasoshojojo|yasoshojojo]] || [[word:yasoshoshosho|yasoshoshosho]] || [[word:yasoshoko|yasoshoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:yasoshothon|yasoshothon]] || [[word:yasoshojon|yasoshojon]] || [[word:yasoshoshon|yasoshoshon]] || [[word:yasoshokon|yasoshokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:yasoshothoro|yasoshothoro]] || [[word:yasoshojoro|yasoshojoro]] || [[word:yasoshoshoro|yasoshoshoro]] || [[word:yasoshokoro|yasoshokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d0c3b9f}}
